blue_oceans.notes: 1M+ REI community. Apps are marketplaces and calculators. Zero apps gamify daily real estate education (one deal analysis per day, one concept studied, one market checked) with streak XP and progression.

1.3M combined community (house hacking + FIRE). Zero apps gamify the daily house hacking journey (one step per day toward first rental unit, XP for milestones like 'ran first deal analysis', 'called first property manager').
438K wholesaling/REI community. Apps are CRMs and data tools. Zero apps gamify the daily wholesaling habit (make 10 cold calls, send 5 offers, follow up 3 leads) with streak XP and activity tracking.

3.25M investing community. All apps are trading platforms or news feeds. Zero apps gamify the daily stock analysis habit (one company analyzed, one chart studied, one thesis written) with streak XP and mastery progression.

2.28M options community. Tastytrade is closest but is a brokerage app. Zero apps gamify the daily options study habit (one strategy reviewed, one backtest run, Greeks quiz) with streak XP and progression levels.

1.88M dividend/FIRE community. Apps are trackers and brokerages. Zero apps gamify the daily dividend investing habit (analyze one dividend stock per day, track yield, payout ratio, dividend growth) with streak XP and passive income milestone rewards.

3M entrepreneur community. Apps are PM tools and forums. Zero apps gamify the daily solopreneur habit (ship one thing, reach one person, build one feature) with streak XP and milestone revenue badges.

3.2M sales/entrepreneur community. CRMs exist for pipeline management. Zero iOS apps gamify the daily cold outreach habit (10 emails sent, 3 follow-ups, 1 reply handled) with streak XP and response rate progression tracking.

850K freelance/nomad community. Upwork/Fiverr are marketplaces, Toggl is time-tracking. Zero apps gamify the daily freelancing growth habit (send 3 proposals, update portfolio once a week, follow up one cold lead) with streak XP.

1.62M nomad/remote community. Nomad List is web-only, others are travel tools. Zero iOS apps gamify the daily digital nomad journey (one skill practiced, one pitch sent, one remote milestone hit) with streak XP and location-unlock rewards.

2.07M FIRE/passive income community. Apps are budgeting or micro-investing tools. Zero apps gamify the daily passive income building habit (research one stream, take one action per day, track $0→$1K milestones) with streak XP and income badge rewards.

3.64M side hustle community. Apps are marketplaces or income trackers. Zero apps gamify the daily side hustle building habit (one skill session, one listing optimized, one customer contacted) with streak XP and earnings-milestone unlocks.

475K dropshipping community. All apps are store builders or fulfillment tools. Zero apps gamify the daily dropshipping research habit (find one winning product, vet one supplier, analyze one ad) with streak XP and store revenue milestone badges.

4.1M small business community. QuickBooks/Wave are accounting tools. Zero apps gamify the daily SMB owner habit (one customer touchpoint, one review requested, one marketing action taken) with streak XP and revenue milestone progression.

225K SaaS/indie community. Analytics tools exist but none gamify the daily SaaS founder discipline (ship one feature, call one customer, fix one churn risk, post one update) with streak XP and MRR milestone unlocks.
